description: Meetup event page is parseable; details link strips tracking params and markdown links in the description become HTML anchors (Fusion LA Israel, Jun 7 2026)

events.title: The New VC Playbook - Investing in vibe coders, solo-founders & builders
events.location: Google for Startups, 12 HaOmanim st., Tel-Aviv, al
events.details: https://www.meetup.com/fusion-la-israel/events/314842056 ‚ÄčFusion VC, Google for Startups, Poalim Tech and AI Builders Israel invite you to a special morning event focused on one of the biggest shifts happening in the startup ecosystem right now: ‚Äč***The rise of AI-native builders, solo founders, vibe coders, and lean startup teams building faster than ever before.*** ‚ÄčAs AI tools reshape product development, distribution, and company building, the traditional venture capital playbook is evolving as well. ## ‚ÄčRSVP HERE * ‚ÄčWhat does the next generation of startups look like? * ‚ÄčWhat are investors looking for in 2026? * ‚ÄčCan solo founders build venture-scale companies? * ‚ÄčAnd how should founders think about fundraising, velocity, and execution in the AI era? ‚ÄčJoin leading founders, operators, and investors for an honest discussion about the future of building and investing. ## ‚ÄčWhat We‚Äôll Cover: * ‚ÄčThe new pre-seed benchmarks in the AI era * ‚ÄčHow AI-native startups are built differently * ‚ÄčSolo founders vs. traditional teams * ‚ÄčThe rise of vibe coding and ultra-lean execution * ‚ÄčWhat top VCs are looking for in 2026 * ‚ÄčHow founders can move faster with AI tools * ‚ÄčReal lessons from builders already scaling AI products ## ‚ÄčAgenda ‚Äč10:00-10:10 - Opening Remarks ‚Äč\*\*Seffi Tsarfati\*\* Head of Strategic Partnerships, VC & Startups Google ‚Äč10:00-10:30 - The New Pre-Seed Benchmarks ‚Äč\*\*Amit Shechter\*\* Principal Fusion VC ‚Äč10:30-11:15 - Founders & Builders Panel ‚Äč\*\*Ben Lavi\*\* Founder, nCode 5 Micro SaaS Founder ‚Äč\*\*Niv Abutbul\*\* Co-Founder & CTO Kadabra AI ‚Äč\*\*Stav Brener\*\* Founder Automagic ‚Äč\*\*Yahav Fuchs\*\* Founder ReddGrow AI ‚Äč**Moderator: Heli Netanel** Co-Founder & CPO Automation Flow ‚Äč11:15-12:00 - Investors Panel - The New Playbook ‚Äč\*\*Lia Cromwell\*\* Partner UpWest VC ‚Äč\*\*Roni Bonjack\*\* Founder & Managing Partner Stealth VC ‚Äč\*\*Yael Alroy\*\* Managing Partner Stardom VC ‚Äč**Moderator: Adi Hoorvitch Lavi, PhD** SVP Poalim Tech ## ‚ÄčWho Should Attend * ‚ÄčEarly-stage founders * ‚ÄčAI builders & developers * ‚ÄčSolo founders * ‚ÄčStartup operators * ‚ÄčCTOs & product leaders * ‚ÄčInvestors interested in the future of AI-native startups ## ‚ÄčRSVP HERE ‚ÄčThe event is free of charge, but registration is required and subject to approval due to limited capacity. Location Google for Startups Campus Ha-Umanim St 12, Tel Aviv-Yafo, 6789731, Israel
